name: Maddock Crystal Table Lamp - CTL1033 - Clear/Gold - Safavieh Couture
description: Illuminate your space with the Maddock crystal table lamp, an embodiment of elegance in clear and gold. This lamp seamlessly combines function with style, making it a perfect addition to any room. Crafted from sturdy iron and adorned with a gold finish, it exudes a sense of modern sophistication. The clear crystal base captures and reflects light beautifully, adding a touch of sparkle to any decor. Whether placed in a living room or a bedroom, its sleek design complements both contemporary and traditional interiors. With its refined look, the Maddock crystal table lamp is designed to enhance your home with a warm and inviting glow. Experience the art of illumination with this tasteful lighting accessory that effortlessly elevates your surroundings.
